message:
feat(connectors): add provisioning automation for intercom, pandadoc, kubernetes, terraform, homeassistant

Implement ProvisioningRecipe, provisioning_readiness(), SelfCheckReport-based
self_check, and enhanced doctor checks for 5 more connectors. Each gets
base_url_policy validation, auth mode detection, network constraint checks,
and 8-20 new provisioning tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
